subcodes.first_line: O thou who art wronged in the path of God! No matter how much thou mayest wail and lament, and give voice to thy grief and distress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلومه سبیل الهی آنچه ناله و فغان نماای و جزع و فزع کنی و زبان بشکوه گشاای
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Imam Husayn, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
